event_discovery.summary: Event discovery produced four clean main definitions in the ideal event-count band with 10-symbol and 36-month coverage.

event_validator.summary: Validator passed with attention; no leakage, outcome-blind selection, and main acceptance gates passed.

forward_diagnostic.summary: Forward diagnostic identified primary volatility/range findings, not directional strategy findings.

robustness_runner.summary: Robustness confirmed the two primary volatility targets under month-aware symbol-balanced null, leave-one-symbol-out, leave-one-month-out, ARBUSDT exclusion, and alternate volatility proxy sensitivity.

theory_queue.selection: outcome-blind queue selected OI_SHOCK_WITH_REALIZED_VOLATILITY_REGIME_SHIFT after closing/deprioritizing prior weak routes
